statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Repo source note for audio.disable-spatial-audio
links.summary: The repo source note links DisableSpatialOnLowLatency to upstream nohuto research and marks the tweak as repo-backed.

links.title: Guest string scan for spatial-audio registry contract
links.summary: Win25H2Clean guest string scan of audiodg.exe, AudioEng.dll, AudioSes.dll, mmdevapi.dll, audiosrv.dll, and AudioEndpointBuilder.dll did not find DisableSpatialOnLowLatency. A Ghidra headless attempt was started but did not produce a usable result in this session.
